holdings.infoBox: RFFC is an equity ETF with a total of 59 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 5.20%, Apple at 4.96%, Microsoft at 4.69%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.05%, and NVIDIA at 4.02%.

overview.description: The ALPS Active Equity Opportunity ETF (RFFC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Composite 1500 index. The fund is an actively managed fund that broadly invests in stocks of various market capitalization. At least 75% of assets are invested in securities by US issuers. RFFC was launched on Jun 7, 2016 and is issued by SS&C.
